name: 2048 Balls
description: 2048 Balls is a puzzle online game for boys for free. If you love playing merge and ball games, you have come to the right place! 2048 Balls is very easy and fun to play, yet can be challenging and addictive. You need to drag and drop the top ball onto all common balls with the same number. If you get stuck, we have plenty of boosters to help you. Can you merge 2048?
tags: 3D, Android, Ball, Boy, Brain, Fun, Highscore, HTML5, Kids, Number, Online, Puzzle
